title: QT Sense closes â¬4M round to support real-time cell analysis
why:
- QT Sense has raised €4 million to advance Quantum Nuova, a quantum-based platform that monitors cellular stress in living cells at single-cell resolution.
- The Quantum Nuova platform uses fluorescent nanodiamond quantum sensors to detect oxidative stress, metabolic changes, and free radical activity in real time.
- Traditional biological methods typically analyze fixed tissue or non-living cells, while Quantum Nuova measures biochemical activity in living cells and tissues, enabling new approaches in spatial biology.
- The technology allows researchers to study how individual cells respond to drugs, adapt to stress, and differentiate, offering insights beyond genomics, proteomics, or conventional imaging.
- The investment will support the transition of Quantum Nuova from a prototype to a deployable discovery platform, with improvements in hardware, throughput, and integrated analytics for real-world research use.
